# @agent-os/config

## Purpose

Composition package that exposes the public `agentos.config.jsonc` schema and
config vocabulary.

## Public API Status

0.5.x experimental config surface. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this package owns the JSONC schema entrypoint.

## Invariant

`@agent-os/config` is the schema and vocabulary surface for authored config data.
It does not define a second decoder, mount targets, resolve providers, execute
config, or produce runtime ledger facts. Config decoding remains owned by the
authoring compiler.

## Minimal Usage

Point `agentos.config.jsonc` at the package schema:

```jsonc
{
  "$schema": "./node_modules/@agent-os/config/schema.json",
  "profile": "workspace@1",
}
```

Import config constants or the shared decoder when tooling needs the typed
config vocabulary:

```ts
import { AGENTOS_CONFIG_PROFILE, decodeAgentOsConfig } from "@agent-os/config";
```

## Verification

```sh
cd packages/composers/config
vp test run
```
